infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 22 - 24 May 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 18:20, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, BWT Alpine F1 Team Document 73 Date 23 May 2026 Time 16:52 No / Driver 10 - Pierre Gasl

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 18:20, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
BWT Alpine F1 Team
Document 73
Date 23 May 2026
Time 16:52
No / Driver 10 - Pierre Gasly
Reason Alleged breach of Article B4.1.1 of the FIA F1 Regulations – Car 44 allegedly
impeding Car 10 in turn 8 at 16:04.
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers
